promotions.title: 0 Handling Fee for the First Remittance to Chinese Mainland
promotions.highlight: 💸 First remittance to Chinese Mainland with 0 fees + receives as soon as 1 hour
promotions.description: Log in to the Airstar Bank App and use 'Remit to Chinese Mainland·WeRemit' to enjoy zero handling fee on your first transfer to Chinese Mainland. Transfers can be received as quickly as within one hour.
promotions.quota: One-time offer per customer. Limited quota, first come, first served.

promotions.title: Activate Money Safe, Get a Pacific Coffee Voucher
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced fraud protection while earning interest on deposits
promotions.description: Secure funds with enhanced protection against fraud losses through the Money Safe feature. Continue earning Savings or Time Deposit interest rates while funds are protected, with offline unlocking requiring in-person appointment.

promotions.title: Travel With Visa Flight Booking Cash Rebate
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to HKD800 cash rebate on flight bookings with Visa card
promotions.description: Enjoy up to HKD800 cash rebate when using a Registered Eligible Visa Card to pay for air tickets booked with Air New Zealand, ANA, Ethiopian Airlines, EVA AIR or Singapore Airlines via their designated official Hong Kong or Macau websites.
promotions.quota: One-time cash rebate reward per cardholder
promotions.cost: Minimum HKD4,000 single transaction (HKD4,000-7,999 for HKD240 rebate, HKD8,000+ for HKD800 rebate)

promotions.title: Bank Securities Transfer 24/7 Service
promotions.highlight: 💱 24/7 instant bank securities transfers in HKD, USD, and CNY
promotions.description: Transfer bank securities with support for HKD, USD, and CNY currencies. Enjoy 24/7 service with instant arrival of transfers, making financial management more convenient.

promotions.title: Lifetime $0 Commissions on HK Stocks
promotions.highlight: 💹 Trade Hong Kong stocks with zero commission forever
promotions.description: Eligible accounts can enjoy zero commission on Hong Kong stocks trading with no expiration. The offer is available for accounts opened during the specified promotion period based on system-recorded time.
promotions.period: Ongoing for eligible accounts opened during promotion period
promotions.quota: Limited to accounts opened during promotion period

promotions.title: Mobile Account Opening in 5 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account via mobile in as fast as 5 minutes
promotions.description: Support for Hong Kong Residents and Visitors in Hong Kong to open an account via mobile phone. Complete the account opening process in as little as 5 minutes with a streamlined digital application.

promotions.title: No Account Management Fees
promotions.highlight: 💰 No account management fees and no minimum deposit requirement
promotions.description: Enjoy free account services with no account management fees charged. No minimum deposit balance requirement to maintain the account, making banking accessible to everyone.

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Personalized Stellar APR
promotions.highlight: 💵 Personal loans up to 12x monthly salary with competitive APR
promotions.description: Access personalized loans with APR ranging from 7.43% to 35.05%. Total loan amount up to 12 times of monthly salary or HKD1,000,000 (whichever is lower). From application to loan disbursement can be completed in as fast as 5 minutes.
promotions.cost: Interest charges apply based on personalized APR

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account
promotions.highlight: 🌐 No minimum balance requirement with multi-currency support
promotions.description: Open a savings account with no minimum balance requirement and access to multiple currencies. Manage your savings across different currencies in one convenient account.

promotions.title: Flexible Time Deposit Placement
promotions.highlight: ⏰ 24/7 time deposit placement with flexible tenors
promotions.description: Place time deposits with flexible tenors at any time, 24 hours a day and 7 days a week. Manage your fixed-term investments according to your financial plans.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Transfer Options
promotions.highlight: 🔄 24/7 instant transfers in multiple currencies
promotions.description: Transfer funds in multiple currencies including HKD, USD, CNY and more. Send money via mobile numbers, email addresses or account numbers with 24/7 instant transfer capability for HKD and CNY via FPS.

promotions.title: Trade Hong Kong & US Stocks Instantly
promotions.highlight: 📈 Low-fee stock trading with fractional shares and global access
promotions.description: Trade Hong Kong and US stocks instantly with low fees. Access fractional shares investing and global markets through the Airstar Bank platform.

promotions.title: Fractional Shares Investing
promotions.highlight: 📊 Start investing with just 1 share for HK stocks or US$5 for US stocks
promotions.description: Invest in fractional shares with a low entry barrier - start with just 1 share for Hong Kong stocks or as little as US$5 for US stocks. This makes investing more accessible for beginners or those with smaller investment capital.

promotions.title: 24/7 Online Banking Services
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Round-the-clock digital banking and customer support
promotions.description: Access banking services 24 hours a day, 7 days a week through the Airstar Bank platform. Includes 24-hour customer hotline service for support whenever needed.

promotions.title: Pay Shield Real-Time Fraud Protection
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ 24/7 real-time fraud protection for payments
promotions.description: Airstar Bank Visa Platinum Card offers Pay Shield, a real-time fraud protection system that monitors transactions 24/7. This provides enhanced security for all your payment activities.

promotions.title: Money Safe Anti-Fraud Protection
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced protection against fraud while earning interest
promotions.description: Money Safe feature provides enhanced protection against fraud losses. Secure your funds while still earning Savings or Time Deposit rates, with funds only unlockable through in-person appointment.

promotions.title: eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings) up to 2.0% p.a. Interest Rate
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to 2.0% p.a. on your HKD savings
promotions.description: Customers who successfully upgrade to eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings) through the AlipayHK App can enjoy up to 2.0% p.a. interest rate. The highest rate of 2.0% p.a. applies to deposits between HKD 200,000 to HKD 800,000, while deposits up to HKD 200,000 earn 0.5% p.a.
promotions.quota: Available to customers who upgrade to eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings) through AlipayHK App

promotions.title: SME Loan Cash Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💵 Up to HKD 100,000 cash rebate on SME loan
promotions.description: Customers who take out an SME loan with Ant Bank can enjoy a cash rebate of up to HKD 100,000 on their first drawdown. This is a limited-time promotion for small and medium enterprises looking for business financing solutions.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account Upgrade
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Open a securities account in as fast as 3 minutes
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers quick securities account opening with the fastest processing time of 3 minutes. This service provides a convenient and efficient way for customers to start trading Hong Kong and US stocks through Ant Bank's platform.

promotions.title: Securities Trading Platform with Low/Zero Commission
promotions.highlight: 💹 Trade Hong Kong and US stocks with low/zero commission
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a one-stop trading platform connecting Hong Kong and US stock markets, allowing customers to seize global investment opportunities. The platform currently features a special promotion with low or zero commission trading, subject to terms and conditions.

promotions.title: Insurance Products with Annual Rate up to 3.6%
promotions.highlight: 📈 Up to 3.6% annualized rate on insurance products
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers insurance products with up to 3.6% annualized rate. These insurance plans are products of YF Life Insurance International Ltd. distributed by Ant Bank (Hong Kong) Limited, which is a registered insurance agency.

promotions.title: Time Deposit with Early Withdrawal Without Penalty
promotions.highlight: ⏰ Time deposits with zero penalty for early withdrawal
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers time deposit accounts with no penalty for early withdrawal of the full amount. The service supports deposits in HKD and USD with a low minimum deposit amount of just HKD 1, allowing customers to enjoy higher interest rates with flexibility.

promotions.title: Direct Third-Party Transfer from Libra Savings
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Transfer directly from Libra Savings to third-party accounts
promotions.description: Experience the new function via Ant Bank APP which allows direct transfers from Libra Savings to third-party accounts. The daily transfer limit has also been increased to up to HKD 1 million for greater flexibility.

promotions.title: SecureLock Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced protection for your deposits
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched SecureLock Service, an anti-fraud measure from the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. It allows customers to lock reserve funds which cannot be transferred through any channels, reducing the risk of fraud while still earning interest.
promotions.quota: Available to all customers with Libra Savings and savings accounts

promotions.title: Installment Loan with Fast Approval
promotions.highlight: 💳 Simple application with fast approval and disbursement
promotions.description: Ant Bank's installment loan offers flexible loan amounts, low interest rates, simple application process, and fast approval with immediate fund disbursement. The service is designed to meet customers' financing needs quickly and efficiently.

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Revolving Credit
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Revolving credit facility with flexible withdrawals
promotions.description: Ant Bank's personal loan offers a revolving credit facility that allows flexible withdrawals and immediate fund disbursement. The loan features easy financial management, simple application, transparent fees, and flexible withdrawal options.

promotions.title: Fund Investment with HKD 1 Minimum
promotions.highlight: 🪙 Invest in funds with as little as HKD 1
promotions.description: Ant Bank's investment fund platform allows customers to invest in funds with a minimum amount of just HKD 1. This low entry barrier makes fund investment accessible to a wider range of customers, enabling them to start building their investment portfolio with minimal capital.

promotions.title: SGAD (Smart Guarded Account Designation) Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Lock your standby deposits with SGAD for extra security
promotions.description: Ant Bank (Hong Kong) has launched the Smart Guarded Account Designation (SGAD) service, an anti-fraud measure introduced by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. This service allows customers to lock standby deposits which cannot be transferred out through any channels, reducing the risk of fraudulent transfers.

promotions.title: Securities Trading Commission-Free Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Trade stocks with zero commission fees!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers zero commission on securities trading, allowing customers to trade Hong Kong and US stocks more cost-effectively. This promotion is part of their one-stop securities trading service with bank-level wealth management.
promotions.cost: Free, subject to terms and conditions

promotions.title: Fixed Deposit No Penalty for Early Withdrawal
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open your account in as fast as 3 minutes!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a fast account opening experience that can take as little as 3 minutes. This feature makes it convenient for customers to open investment accounts quickly without income proof documents.

promotions.title: Fastee Secure Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced security for your deposits with anti-fraud measures!
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Fastee Secure Service, an anti-fraud measure initiated by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. The service allows customers to lock spare deposits that cannot be transferred out through any channels, reducing the risk of fraud while still earning interest.

promotions.title: One-Stop Securities Trading Platform
promotions.highlight: 🌎 Trade Hong Kong and US stocks on a single platform!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a one-stop trading platform connecting Hong Kong and US stock markets, providing global investment opportunities. The platform gives access to Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, ETFs and other global investment solutions.
promotions.cost: Trading fees apply as per service charge schedule

promotions.description: Fusion Bank offers a streamlined account opening process that takes only 5 minutes to complete. Customers simply need their Hong Kong identity card and mobile number to open an account, making it faster than preparing a cup of coffee.

promotions.title: Start Saving From HKD 1

promotions.description: Fusion Bank offers local transfers in HKD, CNY and USD, allowing customers to easily manage their multi-currency needs. Customers can exchange, spend and transfer in these currencies anytime and anywhere.

promotions.title: Global Remittance Service

promotions.description: Fusion Bank offers a global remittance service that allows customers to send money worldwide from their smartphone. Customers can buy foreign currency with real-time exchange rates and send it out or connect to payment networks for cashless spending everywhere.

promotions.title: Deposit Protection up to HKD 800,000

promotions.title: Foreign Currency Exchange Big Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💱 Special rewards for foreign currency exchange

promotions.description: Fusion Bank offers 'Flash Monday' promotions featuring high interest rates for HKD time deposits. This special promotion appears to be a recurring Monday offer for customers looking to maximize returns on their Hong Kong Dollar deposits.

promotions.description: Send money instantly to anyone at any time using the Faster Payment System (FPS). This service is free of charge and available 24/7 through the livi app.

promotions.highlight: 🎁 Special rewards for livi customers
promotions.description: livi offers a rewards program called 'livi Rewards' (or 'Happiness' in Chinese) that provides special benefits and perks to customers. The program includes various offers to enhance the banking experience.

promotions.title: Universal Voyage Travel Insurance Plan
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Comprehensive travel insurance protection
promotions.description: livi offers the Universal Voyage Travel Insurance Plan to provide protection during your travels. This plan covers various travel-related risks and emergencies for customers.

promotions.description: livi provides Easy HomeCare insurance plan to protect customers' homes and belongings. This insurance product offers coverage for various home-related risks and damages.

promotions.highlight: 🐾 Insurance coverage for your beloved pets
promotions.description: livi offers Pet Care insurance plan to help cover veterinary expenses and other pet-related costs. This plan provides financial protection for pet owners when caring for their furry family members.

promotions.title: livi Flexi Personal Loan

promotions.description: livi Flexi Loan offers personal loan options with flexible terms to meet various financial needs. The loan product provides customers with access to funds for personal expenses with customizable repayment schedules.

promotions.highlight: 🏢 Financing solutions for small and medium enterprises

promotions.title: BOC Chill Card

promotions.description: livi offers the BOC Chill Card for customers looking for payment solutions with added benefits. This card provides various privileges and features for cardholders' everyday spending needs.

promotions.description: livi provides the BOC Mastercard Debit Card that allows direct access to funds in customers' accounts. This card offers worldwide acceptance and secure payment options for daily transactions.

promotions.title: Money Safe Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Special rewards for keeping your money safe
promotions.description: livi offers 'Money Safe Rewards' (智安存獎賞) program that provides benefits to customers for maintaining security measures. This program rewards customers for practicing safe banking habits.

promotions.highlight: ⚡️ Enjoy up to HKD80 off orders on Keeta

promotions.title: Mox Journey from Scratch Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💥 Scratch to win rewards worth up to HKD8,888

promotions.quota: Available to all Mox Credit Card holders

promotions.title: Daily Interest Calculation
promotions.highlight: 💸 Interest on savings calculated and credited to your account daily
promotions.description: Mox calculates and credits interest to your Mox Account daily, allowing your savings to grow faster. This is a permanent feature of Mox accounts with no end date or special eligibility requirements.

promotions.title: Mox Invest Trading Services
promotions.highlight: 📈 Trade HK and US stocks including fractional shares with low fees
promotions.description: Mox is the first digital bank allowing customers to trade in both HK and US stocks, including fractional shares. Invest with low fees in stocks and funds with the security and advantages of a bank.

promotions.title: USD Savings Rate
promotions.highlight: 💵 1% p.a. interest on USD savings with no strings attached
promotions.description: Starting 1 March 2025, enjoy 1% p.a. interest on your USD savings with no strings attached. Interest is calculated and credited to your account daily, allowing you to watch your savings grow every day.

promotions.title: Mox Credit FPS Payments
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Pay with Mox Credit via FPS for transfers and bill payments
promotions.description: Use your Mox Credit to make payments via FPS, making daily transfers or paying bills effortlessly. This feature is automatically unlocked when your credit limit is approved, with no extra documents required.

promotions.title: 3-Minute Investment Account Opening for Existing Customers
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open investment account in 3 minutes for existing customers
promotions.description: PAObank allows existing savings account customers to open an investment account in as fast as 3 minutes. This streamlined process enables customers to quickly start investing without lengthy application procedures.
promotions.quota: Available to existing PAObank savings account holders

promotions.title: No Minimum Balance Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💰 Bank with zero minimum balance requirements
promotions.description: PAObank offers accounts with no minimum balance requirement. Customers can maintain their accounts without worrying about meeting minimum balance thresholds or incurring related fees.

promotions.title: 24/7 Full Banking Capability
promotions.highlight: 🕒 Access banking services anytime with 24/7 availability
promotions.description: PAObank provides round-the-clock banking services through their mobile application. Customers can manage their accounts, make transfers, and access other banking features at any time of day or night.

promotions.title: Services for Residents and Visitors in Hong Kong
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Banking services available for Hong Kong visitors
promotions.description: PAObank offers banking services for visiting customers who are physically present in Hong Kong. This allows tourists and temporary visitors to access banking services during their stay in Hong Kong.
promotions.quota: Available to visitors physically present in Hong Kong

promotions.title: Low Investment Threshold for Money Market Funds
promotions.highlight: 💵 Invest in money market funds from just HK$100
promotions.description: PAObank allows customers to invest in money market funds with a low minimum subscription amount of just HK$100. This low entry threshold makes money market investments accessible to a wider range of customers.
promotions.quota: Available to all investment account holders

promotions.title: Hong Kong Stocks Trading with 0 Platform Fee
promotions.highlight: 💹 No platform fees for Hong Kong stock trading
promotions.description: PAObank offers Hong Kong stock trading with zero platform fees. Investors only pay the commission fees of 0.15% with a minimum charge of HKD50 per trade, making stock investments more cost-effective.
promotions.quota: Available to all investment account holders

promotions.title: Extended US Stock Trading Hours
promotions.highlight: 📈 Extended 16-hour trading for US stocks
promotions.description: PAObank offers a 16-hour US stock trading window including pre-market, regular market, and after-hours trading. This extended trading period gives investors more flexibility to react to market events outside regular trading hours.
promotions.quota: Available to all investment account holders

promotions.title: Free LV1 Real-time Hong Kong Stock Quotes
promotions.highlight: 📊 Unlimited free real-time HK stock quotes
promotions.description: PAObank provides free Level 1 (LV1) real-time market quotes for Hong Kong stocks with unlimited usage. This feature helps investors make informed trading decisions with up-to-date market information.
promotions.quota: Available to all stock trading account holders

promotions.title: Mixed and Equity Funds 1% Subscription Fee
promotions.highlight: 📈 Competitive 1% subscription fee for equity funds
promotions.description: PAObank offers mixed and equity funds with a competitive 1% subscription fee. This fee structure provides cost-effective access to diversified equity and mixed asset investments.
promotions.quota: Available to all investment account holders

promotions.title: Same-Day Money Market Fund Redemption
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Get your money back as soon as same day when redeeming money market funds
promotions.description: Fast redemption service for money market funds with funds credited to the customer's bank account as quickly as the same day. Provides high liquidity for money market investments.

promotions.title: US Stock Trading Fixed Commission
promotions.highlight: 🇺🇸 Trade US stocks for just USD 0.012 per share
promotions.description: PAObank offers US stock trading with a competitive commission of USD 0.012 per share with a minimum charge of USD 7.88 per trade. There are no additional platform fees, providing transparent pricing for US stock investors.
promotions.quota: Available to all investment account holders
promotions.cost: USD 0.012 per share (minimum USD 7.88 per trade)

promotions.title: WeLab Global Wallet Best Exchange Rates
promotions.highlight: 💱 Enjoy the best FX rates in town for foreign currency exchange
promotions.description: WeLab Bank offers the best exchange rates in town for foreign currency conversions. The comparison is based on exchange rates from 28 retail banks in Hong Kong, with WeLab's rates being the lowest in the market.

promotions.title: WeLab Global Wallet $0 Foreign Currency Transaction Fee
promotions.highlight: 💳 $0 foreign currency transaction fee for 10 supported currencies
promotions.description: Enjoy zero foreign currency transaction fees when using the WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card for transactions in 10 supported currencies including JPY, USD, CNY, AUD, GBP, EUR, SGD, CAD, CHF, and NZD.

promotions.title: Easter Lucky Draw & Cash Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Win from 300 prizes plus earn up to 3% overseas spending cash rebate
promotions.description: Participate in the Easter Lucky Draw by spending with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card and exchanging foreign currencies. Enjoy up to 3% cash rebate on overseas spending while getting chances to win prizes including HKD1,000 travel cash vouchers.
promotions.cost: Requires at least one eligible transaction during the promotion period

promotions.title: Up to 3% Overseas Spending Cashback
promotions.highlight: 💰 Up to 0.2% on local spending and up to 3% on overseas spending cash rebate
promotions.description: Cardholders can enjoy up to 0.2% cash rebate on local spending and up to 3% cash rebate on overseas spending when using the WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card. Cash rebate will be automatically deposited into the core account by May 31, 2026.
promotions.quota: Maximum HKD 50 rebate or equivalent per eligible transaction

promotions.title: 2-in-1 Welcome Rewards April 2026
promotions.highlight: 💰 Get up to ~HKD 5,000 cash rewards for new customers
promotions.description: New customers who open an account with promo code 'WL5000' can enjoy up to 4% p.a. time deposit interest rate plus HKD 4,000 investment fund cash reward. Total rewards can reach approximately HKD 5,000.

promotions.title: First-time Foreign Currency Exchange Rebate
promotions.highlight: 💱 HKD 50 cash rebate for first-time foreign currency exchange
promotions.description: New foreign currency exchange customers who exchange HKD 20,000 or above in a single transaction to one of 10 designated popular foreign currencies can enjoy a HKD 50 cash rebate on their first exchange.

promotions.title: $0 Fund Subscription and Switching Fee
promotions.highlight: 💹 Unlimited $0 subscription and switching fees for all funds
promotions.description: WeLab Bank offers unlimited $0 subscription and switching fees for all funds in its investment platform. This allows customers to flexibly allocate their funds, build a diversified passive income stream, and make investing and wealth growth simple and stress-free.
promotions.cost: Fixed monthly platform fee of 0.1% on fund holding value

promotions.title: Digital Wealth Advisory Service
promotions.highlight: 🤖 AI-powered personalized investment advice for portfolio management
promotions.description: WeLab Bank's Digital Wealth Advisory service provides personalized fund portfolio recommendations based on customers' investment goals. The system automatically invests monthly according to set preferences and provides progress alerts.

promotions.title: Trip.com Discount with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Save up to HKD 500 on Trip.com bookings with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card
promotions.description: Get instant discounts of up to HKD 500 when booking flights and hotels on Trip.com using the WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card. Limited quota available on a first-come-first-served basis.
promotions.cost: Minimum spending required, varies by product

promotions.title: Tesla Customer Personal Instalment Loan Offer
promotions.highlight: 🚘 Exclusive 4.55% APR personal loan for Tesla customers
promotions.description: Tesla customers can enjoy a preferential personal installment loan with APR as low as 4.55% when applying with promo code 'TESLA5' and providing Tesla vehicle subscription proof. Maximum loan amount of HKD 1,500,000 or 18 times monthly salary (whichever is lower).
promotions.quota: Tesla customers only, limited quota available

promotions.title: Extra Lucky Draw Chances for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🎲 New customers receive 50 additional lucky draw entries
promotions.description: New customers receive 50 additional lucky draw entries for the Easter Lucky Draw promotion when using the Global Wallet Debit Card for overseas spending. They'll also enjoy 3% cash rebate on overseas spending and automatic participation in the lucky draw.

promotions.title: Personal Loan Cash Rebate Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Get up to HKD 23,888 cash rebate on personal loans
promotions.description: Customers who successfully apply for a personal loan with an approved amount of HKD 150,001 or above and a repayment period of 24 months or more, and withdraw the loan within 7 days of approval, can enjoy a cash rebate of up to HKD 23,888.
promotions.cost: Minimum loan amount of HKD 150,001, minimum 24-month repayment period

promotions.title: Loan Referral Program
promotions.highlight: 👥 Earn HKD 800 for each successful loan referral
promotions.description: WeLab Bank customers can earn HKD 800 cash reward for each friend or family member who successfully applies for a personal loan using their referral code and withdraws the loan within 7 days of approval. Maximum reward of HKD 8,000 (10 successful referrals).

promotions.title: Investment Fund Cash Reward
promotions.highlight: 💹 Earn up to HKD 4,000 cash reward on fund investments
promotions.description: New customers who open an account with promo code 'WL5000' can enjoy up to HKD 4,000 cash reward on eligible fund transactions. The reward amount is based on the cumulative eligible fund transaction amount.

promotions.title: 4% p.a. GoSave 2.0 Time Deposit Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💰 Enjoy 4% p.a. interest rate on HKD time deposits
promotions.description: New customers who open an account with promo code 'WL5000' can enjoy a preferential interest rate of 4% p.a. on designated HKD GoSave 2.0 time deposits opened within the specified period.

promotions.title: WeLab Bank Personal Loan R Friends Referral Program
promotions.highlight: 👥 Earn HKD800 for each successful personal loan referral
promotions.description: WeLab Bank customers can refer friends or relatives to apply for a WeLab Bank personal loan using their referral code. For each successful referral who draws down the loan within 7 days of approval, the referrer receives HKD800 cash reward.
promotions.quota: Maximum 10 successful referrals (HKD8,000) per customer during promotion period

promotions.title: 0.1% Monthly Fund Platform Fee
promotions.highlight: 💼 Low 0.1% monthly fee instead of traditional subscription fees
promotions.description: WeLab Bank charges a uniform monthly fee of 0.1% based on the total value of selected funds, helping customers save nearly 85% in transaction fees compared to traditional subscription fee models. This allows for unlimited trading and portfolio adjustments.
promotions.cost: 0.1% monthly platform fee based on fund value

promotions.title: ZA Bank 0% Fund Subscription Fee Offer
promotions.highlight: 💼 0% subscription fees on ALL funds with no cap
promotions.description: ZA Bank retail banking users who have activated fund trading services can enjoy 0% fund subscription fee offer and redemption fee waivers for all funds. This allows 100% of your investment to go directly into the market.
promotions.quota: All ZA Bank customers with fund trading services

promotions.title: Customer Referral Program - Referrer Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Earn up to HKD 90,000 in cash rewards for referrals
promotions.description: Refer friends to open ZA Bank accounts and earn various cash rewards. Top 20 referrers with most successful referrals in each phase can earn up to HKD 10,000. Additional rewards available when referred friends meet deposit or multi-product requirements.
promotions.quota: All existing ZA Bank customers eligible to refer

promotions.title: New Customer Welcome Reward and StockBack Bonus
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Rewards worth HKD 2,026 for new customers via referral
promotions.description: New customers who open an account using a referral code can receive a package of rewards worth HKD 2,026 including fund holding rebate coupons (HKD 780 + HKD 20), stock cash rebate coupons, currency exchange discount, and overseas remittance cashback.
promotions.quota: New customers who open account with referral code

promotions.title: StockBack x ZA Card Reward Program
promotions.highlight: 💰 Get stocks for free after successfully purchasing stocks with your card
promotions.description: Hong Kong's first StockBack x ZA Card offers stock rewards for eligible card transactions. Spending with your card is no longer just about saving points, but directly getting shares. Accumulate stocks through your daily spending.
promotions.quota: Available to all ZA Card holders who spend at least HKD 10 per transaction
promotions.cost: Minimum spend of HKD 10 per transaction

promotions.title: Year-Round Travel Offers with ZA Card
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Special travel discounts and offers all year round
promotions.description: Exclusive travel discounts and offers available throughout the year with ZA Card. Enjoy special rates on flights, hotels, and travel-related services.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Hold 11 different currencies in one account
promotions.description: ZA Bank's multi-currency savings account allows customers to hold 11 different currencies, including HKD, CNY, USD, GBP, SGD, EUR, CAD, AUD, JPY, NZD, and CHF. Exchange currencies 24/7 at your preferred rates.

promotions.title: Free Cash Withdrawals at Visa ATMs
promotions.highlight: 💸 Free cash withdrawals at over 3,000 Visa ATMs across Hong Kong
promotions.description: ZA Bank customers can withdraw cash for free at over 3,000 Visa ATMs throughout Hong Kong using their ZA Card. No withdrawal fees or charges apply.

promotions.title: Free Crypto Trading Platform Fee for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🪙 $0 platform fee for first 90 days after account opening
promotions.description: New crypto trading customers can enjoy $0 platform fee for the first 90 days after opening their ZA Bank account. Trade cryptocurrencies 24/7 directly with HKD or USD deposits with no platform fees during this period.

promotions.title: Custom Card Number Selection
promotions.highlight: 🔢 Choose the last 6 digits of your ZA Card number
promotions.description: ZA Bank is the first in Hong Kong to allow customers to choose the last 6 digits on their card face. Personalize your Visa debit card with your preferred number combination.

promotions.title: ZA Bank FPS Free Instant Transfers
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Free instant inter-bank transfers via FPS
promotions.description: Enjoy free instant transfers to other banks via FPS (Faster Payment System). Send and receive HKD and CNY with just a mobile phone number, with zero transfer fees.

promotions.title: ZA Bank Payment Connect Cross-Border Transfer
promotions.highlight: 🌏 Fee-free real-time transfers between Mainland China and Hong Kong
promotions.description: Send money between Mainland China and Hong Kong in real-time with zero fees using Payment Connect. Instant cross-border transfers without any handling charges.

promotions.title: Hong Kong Stock Trading Commission-Free Promotion
promotions.highlight: 📈 0 brokerage, 0 custody fees for stock trading
promotions.description: Trade stocks with 0 brokerage fees and 0 custody fees. Platform fees as low as USD 1.99 for US stocks or HKD 18 per transaction for HK stocks. Enjoy direct integration with your ZA Bank account for seamless trading experience.
promotions.quota: All ZA Bank customers with investment accounts

promotions.title: ZA Card PowerDraw
promotions.highlight: 🎯 Win up to 200% rebate through PowerDraw
promotions.description: Spend with your ZA Card to participate in PowerDraw. Get a chance to win up to 200% rebate on your spending through the PowerDraw mechanism.

promotions.title: Fast Loan Approval
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Get loan approval results in as fast as 90 seconds
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers fast loan approval with results available in as fast as 90 seconds. Loan amounts up to HKD 1,000,000 with annualized percentage rates as low as 1.30%.

promotions.title: New Stock Trading Customer Cash Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💵 Up to HKD 1,500 in cash rewards for new stock traders
promotions.description: New users can receive up to HKD 500 in cash rewards for opening an account, plus up to HKD 1,000 in cash rebates for buying stocks. This offer is specifically for Hong Kong stock trading customers.
promotions.cost: Must buy stocks to qualify for portion of rewards

promotions.title: 20% p.a. HKD Time Deposit for Meeting Deposit Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💹 New users can enjoy 20% p.a. interest rate on 7-day HKD time deposits
promotions.description: New customers referred through the referral program can receive a +19.9% p.a. 7-day HKD time deposit interest rate bonus coupon, which combined with the base rate offers a total of 20% p.a. interest rate. Additional coupons can be earned by meeting specified requirements.
promotions.cost: Must be referred through program and meet deposit requirements

promotions.title: Fund Position Rebate Vouchers for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🧾 Receive HKD 800 in fund position rebate vouchers
promotions.description: New customers can receive fund position rebate vouchers worth HKD 800 (including one HKD 780 voucher and one HKD 20 voucher). These vouchers are valid for 30 days after receipt and can be used to offset fund investment costs.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: Currency Exchange Discount Voucher
promotions.highlight: 💱 Receive HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher
promotions.description: New customers can receive a HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher valid for 30 days after receipt. This voucher can be used to reduce the cost of currency exchange transactions within ZA Bank.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: ZA Card No Annual Fee
promotions.highlight: 💳 No annual fees or hidden charges on ZA Card
promotions.description: ZA Bank's Visa debit card comes with no annual fees or hidden charges, providing a cost-effective payment solution. The card supports Apple Pay and Google Pay for convenient digital payments.

promotions.title: ZA Bank 24/7 Banking Service
promotions.highlight: ⏰ 24/7 banking services always available, no matter the time of day
promotions.description: ZA Bank provides around-the-clock banking services with 24x7 customer service support. Users can access banking features including deposits, transfers, and foreign exchange at any time without time restrictions.

promotions.title: Group Lai See Feature
promotions.highlight: 🧧 Send Group Lai See with one tap without entering recipients individually
promotions.description: Users can distribute Lai See (red packets) to groups with a single tap, eliminating the need to enter recipients individually. This convenient feature simplifies the traditional practice of sending red packets during holidays and special occasions.

promotions.title: ZA Bank x Wise Express Remittance
promotions.highlight: 🚀 HKD payments with express remittance by Wise arrive faster than standard transfers
promotions.description: ZA Bank partners with Wise to provide express remittance services, allowing HKD payments to arrive faster than standard international transfers. This service enables quicker cross-border payments for users.

promotions.title: Insurance in 3 Minutes
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ Get insured in as fast as 3 minutes via your smartphone
promotions.description: In partnership with ZA Insure, users can complete insurance applications in as little as 3 minutes via smartphone. Coverage options include life insurance, critical illness insurance, and Voluntary Health Insurance Scheme (VHIS).

promotions.title: Hong Kong Stock Trading Cashback
promotions.highlight: 💰 Get up to HKD 1,500 when opening an account and trading Hong Kong stocks
promotions.description: New users can receive up to HKD 500 cash rewards for opening an account and up to HKD 1,000 cash rebate when buying stocks. The promotion offers significant cash incentives for new stock trading customers.
